name: The New Adventures of Pinkgirl and The Scone
original_name: The New Adventures of Pinkgirl and The Scone
overview: Unemployed super heroes, Pinkgirl and The Scone attempt to cut through the bureaucratic red tape of the League of Leagues to become sanctioned heroes once again. All while being followed and filmed by their mild mannered documentarian, James Jenson.

trailers.title: The New Adventures of Pinkgirl & The Scone - Episode One
